description: The process-backlog.md is listed in inputDocuments (7 entries) but missing from derives_from (6 entries). This breaks the provenance chain — if the document derives from the backlog, that relationship is undeclared.
evidence: inputDocuments entry 7: 'docs/process/process-backlog.md'. No matching derives_from entry exists.
suggestion: Add derives_from entry for process-backlog.md or clarify it was reference-only (not a source) and move to a separate references field.

description: Signal column for 'Time spent on spec revision' is a copy-paste of the Target column, making the Signal column meaningless for this row.

location: Developer Tool Specific Requirements > Installation Architecture (repo structure diagram)
description: The source layout diagram shows only skills/, ide/, and package.json. It omits docs/ and module/ directories that appear in the Documentation section's repo structure. A reader comparing these two diagrams may be confused about the canonical repo layout.
evidence: Installation Architecture diagram: 'momentum/ ├── skills/ ├── ide/ └── package.json'. Documentation section: 'momentum/ ├── LICENSE ├── README.md ├── CONTRIBUTING.md ├── skills/ ├── ide/ ├── docs/ └── module/'
suggestion: Add a clarifying note that the Installation Architecture diagram shows source separation only (the distribution/build input), while the Documentation section shows the full repo structure including docs and module.
